titleStmt.title: SII 26.314: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 314. (A.R. No. 296 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of a sandhi lamp and a sum of 3 paḻaṅkāśu for it, to the same temple in the same Tirukkachchūr village by Perumpēṟuḍaiyāṉ Nambiyāḻvāṉ of Mūlaṅguḍi in Uyyakkoṇḍa-vaḷanāḍu in Śōḻamaṇḍalam. The money was accepted by the Śivabrāhmaṇa Dēvargaḷ Sundaran alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira-bhaṭṭaṉ of Bhāradvāja-[gōtra], who had right of worship in the temple, and who had agreed to carry out the object of the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīirājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 7āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattū
r koṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut tirukkaccūr Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkoyiluṭaiyāṟku coḻamaṇṭalattu Uyyakkoṇṭavaḷa
nāṭṭu mulaṅkuṭi kāṇiyuṭaiya perumpeṟuṭaiyāṉ nampiyāḻvāṉ vaitta cantiviḷakku 1 cantiviḷakku Oṉṟukku Ikko
yilil kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇaṉ bhāradvāji tevarkaḷ cuntaranāna nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu
3 Ippaḻaṅkācu muṉṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Iccantiviḷakku Oṉṟum cantirātittavarai Erikkak kaṭavenāka cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭutte
ṉ nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭaṉeṉ § Itu panmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.314 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
